entries.name: cowork-marketplace:browse
entries.intent: Browse and search the cowork marketplace catalog of templates, workflows, agent configs, skill packs, and session blueprints

entries.name: cowork-marketplace:bundle-export
entries.intent: Export a plugin bundle as a single Cowork-compatible plugin ZIP by merging commands, agents, and skills from multiple source plugins

entries.name: cowork-marketplace:bundles
entries.intent: Browse pre-packaged plugin bundles that combine multiple Claude Code plugins into single Cowork-distributable packages

entries.name: cowork-marketplace:collections
entries.intent: Browse curated collections of marketplace items grouped by domain and use case

entries.name: cowork-marketplace:details
entries.intent: Show detailed information about a marketplace item including plugin bindings, trust score, and capabilities

entries.name: cowork-marketplace:export
entries.intent: Export a marketplace item as a standalone Cowork plugin ZIP for distribution

entries.name: cowork-marketplace:install
entries.intent: Install a cowork marketplace item and configure its plugin bindings

entries.name: cowork-marketplace:launch
entries.intent: Launch a cowork session using an installed marketplace item with its bound agents and skills

entries.name: cowork-marketplace:stats
entries.intent: Show marketplace statistics including total items, plugins, agents, skills, and commands

entries.name: cowork-marketplace:update
entries.intent: Update an installed marketplace item by re-syncing its plugin bindings and registry entry
